markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a potential partnership between GrowthX.ai and FletchPMM.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1374.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Shared Scaling Challenge:** Both agencies are at capacity, limited by the founders' time. GrowthX is capped at 2 new clients/week, while FletchPMM is booked into February.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**Divergent Business Models:** GrowthX uses a recurring, productized agency model ($13M revenue) to fund a separate community ($30/mo) and software platform. FletchPMM is a high-margin, project-based firm (\~$2M revenue) focused on a single positioning sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [**Partnership Path:** A joint webinar will validate FletchPMM's training concept for scaling its team. This serves as a low-risk, high-value brand marketing play for both.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=2431.0)
  - [**Recurring Revenue Opportunity:** Jason proposed a "positioning controller" service to measure AI-driven research trends, creating a recurring revenue stream for FletchPMM.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)

## Topics

### FletchPMM's Scaling Challenge

  - [**Business Model:** Project-based agency focused on a single, high-margin positioning sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [**Revenue:** \~$2M annually.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**Growth Strategy:** Scale the core service to $5M before launching new initiatives (e.g., software).](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**Primary Bottleneck:** Supply-side capacity, not demand.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
      - [The business is built on founder credibility, making it difficult to delegate.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
      - [Booked into February with zero outbound marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** A training course to certify freelancers in the FletchPMM process.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [**Goal:** Build a "shadow product marketer" network (\~20 people) to increase capacity and run upsell projects.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
      - [**Dilemma:** A course would serve product marketers, not FletchPMM's core founder/DMO customer.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Productized Agency Model

  - [**Business Model:** Recurring-revenue agency using a proprietary platform to deliver content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [**Revenue:** \~$13M annually.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [**Scaling Bottleneck:** Onboarding is a high-touch, non-scalable process (2–4 weeks/client).](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=416.0)
  - [**Community as a Funnel:** A separate community (newsletter, Circle) drives leads and serves as a pipeline for future software users.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
      - [**Members:** \~170 paying $30/mo.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
      - [**Lead Gen:** Webinars convert \~10% of attendees into qualified leads.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1883.0)

### Proposed Partnership & Recurring Revenue

  - [**Shared Need:** Both agencies need to train talent to scale.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1460.0)
  - [**Recurring Revenue Idea:** Jason proposed a "positioning controller" service for FletchPMM.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Concept:** Continuously monitor how AI (e.g., ChatGPT) answers product-related questions.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
      - [**Goal:** Provide recurring insights on market perception and competitor framing.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
      - [**FletchPMM's Response:** Intrigued but skeptical of the scope creep and difficulty of quantitative measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [**Agreed Partnership:** A joint webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=2431.0)
      - [**Format:** FletchPMM will "grill" GrowthX's client positioning documents, demonstrating their process.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=2431.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A low-risk way to validate FletchPMM's training concept and generate brand equity.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=2319.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:** Create a shared channel to plan the joint webinar.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=2538.0)
  - [**Jason:** Share GrowthX's webinar promotion playbook to maximize long-term value.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=2547.0)
  - [**Both:** Define the webinar scope, focusing on FletchPMM's positioning expertise and GrowthX's content execution.](https://fathom.video/share/3rsxQbSH1Sj5qn72q8e42--mo5jYh_Gu?tab=summary&timestamp=2431.0)
